steps.t: Misthallow can be found north of the Floodfells. You should travel to Thokvist in the southern end of Misthallow.
Skarding Wargsbane can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Skarding.
Fanglind can be found at Thokvist. You should greet Fanglind.
Fanglind can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Fanglind.
